'''yavasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibbingite|hibbingite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibbingite|hibbingite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yavasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yævæsæth|yævæsæth]] || [[word:yævæsæj|yævæsæj]] || [[word:yævæsæsh|yævæsæsh]] || [[word:yævæsæ|yævæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavavasath|yavavasath]] || [[word:yavavasaj|yavavasaj]] || [[word:yavavasash|yavavasash]] || [[word:yavavasa|yavavasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavasath|yavasath]] || [[word:yavasaj|yavasaj]] || [[word:yavasash|yavasash]] || [[word:yavasa|yavasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavafsath|yavafsath]] || [[word:yavafsaj|yavafsaj]] || [[word:yavafsash|yavafsash]] || [[word:yavafsaf|yavafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yavasatha|yavasatha]] || [[word:yavasaja|yavasaja]] || [[word:yavasasha|yavasasha]] || [[word:yavasaka|yavasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yavasath|yavasath]] || [[word:yavasaj|yavasaj]] || [[word:yavasash|yavasash]] || [[word:yavasa|yavasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yavasathal|yavasathal]] || [[word:yavasajal|yavasajal]] || [[word:yavasashal|yavasashal]] || [[word:yavasakal|yavasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yavasathatha|yavasathatha]] || [[word:yavasajaja|yavasajaja]] || [[word:yavasashasha|yavasashasha]] || [[word:yavasaka|yavasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yavasathan|yavasathan]] || [[word:yavasajan|yavasajan]] || [[word:yavasashan|yavasashan]] || [[word:yavasakan|yavasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yavasathaoro|yavasathaoro]] || [[word:yavasajaoro|yavasajaoro]] || [[word:yavasashaoro|yavasashaoro]] || [[word:yavasakaoro|yavasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
